title: Stellarioides cepifolium
taxonomy: Stellarioides cepifolium is classified within the family Stellariaceae. This plant family is closely related to the Caryophyllaceae family. However, some sources may group Stellarioides cepifolium under the Caryophyllaceae family due to its shared characteristics. Further research is needed to confirm the exact classification. The plant's classification is still a topic of ongoing research and debate among botanists.
